title: dubautia imbricata
intro: Dubautia imbricata, also known as the Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific islands, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Dubautia imbricata is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
